To combat insomnia, you must prioritize your sleep hygiene every night. Start with a calming pre-sleep routine, such as reading a physical book or taking a warm bath. Additionally, adjust your diet by limiting caffeine and heavy meals in the evening to support your sleep hygiene. For tracking, consider using apps like Sleep Cycle or Calm to monitor your habits. Consistency in these practices is essential for maintaining proper sleep hygiene. Ultimately, mastering your sleep hygiene will lead to better rest.
